---
title: affectiveSamplerJS
subtitle: A Javascript library to record people's real-time affective reactions to
  audio/video sequences.
description: A Javascript library to record people's real-time affective reactions
  to audio/video sequences.
---

<div class="software-links" style="margin-bottom: 1.5em;">
<a href="https://github.com/QuentinAndre/AffectiveSamplerJS" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" target="_blank" rel="noopener">See on GitHub</a>
<a href="https://codepen.io/QuentinAndre/pen/ROrByr/" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" target="_blank" rel="noopener">See on CodePen</a>
</div>

To find out how to use the library in your own research, <a href="https://github.com/QuentinAndre/AffectiveSamplerJS" target="_blank">visit the github repository.</a>
